introSection: Flotter Otto is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany. It opened on 25 March 2023.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Flotter Otto is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Skyline Park in Bad Wörishofen, Bavaria, Germany. It opened on 25 March 2023.



Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.
